<!-- Title: use Conventional Commits, e.g. "feat(gemini): namespaced commands" -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link issues: Closes #NN -->

## Type

- [ ] feat  - [ ] fix  - [ ] docs  - [ ] refactor  - [ ] chore  - [ ] test  - [ ] ci

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title; `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-facing.
- [ ] `python -m compileall install.py runtimes.py src` passes.
- [ ] Works (or is guarded) on Windows, macOS, and Linux — no hardcoded paths.
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or internal/company names added.
- [ ] Docs updated (README.md and, when relevant, README.pt-BR.md).
